findings.location: s8 — Messageを使用する実装例 (code block)
findings.description: The source code contains a syntax error: `Message errorMessage =  = MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG0002", message);` (double assignment operator). The knowledge file silently corrects this to `Message errorMessage = MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG0002", message);`. While the correction is clearly beneficial, the code in the knowledge file differs from the source.
